items.title: Canonical structured source is explicitly defined
items.description: The repo clearly states which source owns the core structured post-close tables for v1.0, and that the default implementation target is the Tushare Pro 2000-point tier rather than a 5000-point VIP assumption.

items.title: Official disclosure sources are explicitly defined
items.description: The repo distinguishes structured market data from official disclosure and public-information sources.

items.title: AKShare and BaoStock roles are narrowed without contradicting source docs
items.description: AKShare and BaoStock remain formal supported source adapters, but the repo no longer implies that supplemental adapters or their hidden upstream endpoints should serve as the sole canonical persistence source.
